data.name: Nagant

weaponImprint.name: Nagant M1895
weaponImprint.trait: Outside of the user's turn, attack range is increased by 1 tile, and stability damage is increased by 1 point.
weaponImprint.effect: When applying a debuff, the damage of the next active skill is increased by 5%/5%/5%/10%/10%/10%. If the debuff is a defense debuff, an additional 1 debuff is applied for 1 turn, and the damage of the next active skill is further increased by an additional 5%/6%/7%/8%/9%/10%. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.

data.effects: A Doll who likes to play the mature grown-up, but looks up to heroes and also aspires to be one. Even after leaving the battlefield, she continues to shine as a security Doll, ensuring peaceful nights.

skills.name: Point Shooting
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Veteran's Skills
skills.description: For each instance of damage dealt, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. If an enemy unit moves within Nagant's range, she deals Physical damage equal to 50% of attack and 2 points of stability damage. If the target has a defense debuff, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to the target for 1 turn. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: For each instance of damage dealt, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. If an enemy unit moves within Nagant's range, she deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If the target has a defense debuff, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to the target for 1 turn. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3: For each instance of damage dealt, gains 1 point of Confectance Index. If an enemy unit moves within Nagant's range, she deals Physical damage equal to 80% of attack and 3 points of stability damage. If the target has a defense debuff, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to the target for 1 turn. This effect can only be triggered twice per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier increases by 30% and deals 3 points of Stability Damage.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: Increase the trigger count by 1 every turn.

skills.name: Senior's Admonishment
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deal Physical damage equal to 130% of attack to it. After activating if the target is under the effects of Stability Break, apply [effect:1b908c38-3129-4280-8ba4-73f162e680e0] to the target for 1 turn.

skills.name: Friend of Justice
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical Damage equal to 70% of attack. If there are no enemy units within 4 tiles, performs an additional attack on the original target and applies [effect:1b908c38-3129-4280-8ba4-73f162e680e0] to them for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Physical Damage equal to 70% of attack. If there are no enemy units within 4 tiles, performs an additional attack on the original target and applies [effect:1b908c38-3129-4280-8ba4-73f162e680e0] to them for 1 turn. If the target is inflicted with defense debuffs, reduces this skill's cooldown by 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals physical damage equal to 70% of attack. If there are no enemy units within 3 tiles, performs an additional attack on the original target and applies [effect:1b908c38-3129-4280-8ba4-73f162e680e0] to them for 1 turn. If the target is inflicted with defense debuffs, reduces this skill's cooldown by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target has a defense debuff, this skill's cooldown is reduced by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: If there are no enemies within 3 tiles around self, perform an additional attack on the original target.

skills.name: Sanction Declaration
skills.description: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Corrosion damage equal to 150% of attack to them. If the target has defense debuffs, applies [effect:0b76cac3-8e34-4e32-98d8-d204e26522d7] before attacking for 2 turns. Stability damage dealt by this attack is increased by 2 points.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Corrosion damage equal to 150% of attack to them. If the target has defense debuffs, applies [effect:0b76cac3-8e34-4e32-98d8-d204e26522d7] before attacking for 2 turns. Stability damage dealt by this attack is increased by 2 points, and critical rate is increased by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 enemy target within 6 tiles and deals Corrosion damage equal to 160% of attack to them. If the target has defense debuffs, applies [effect:0b76cac3-8e34-4e32-98d8-d204e26522d7] before attacking for 2 turns. Stability damage dealt by this attack is increased by 2 points, and critical rate is increased by 20%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: If the target has Defense debuffs, increases critical rate by 20%.

keys.effect: If target's Stability Index is lower than this unit's. increases damage dealt to them by 7%.

After an active attack, applies [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] to the target for 2 turns. If this effect triggers multiple times against the same target in a battle, the duration of [effect:dd0752a2-37c4-47ba-91ad-2dc640d2372b] changes to 1 turn.
Gain 3 points of Confectance Index at the start of battle.
If attacking enemy targets with defensive debuffs, reduces the cooldown of all active skills by 1 turn.
If attacked by enemy targets with debuffs, reduces damage taken by 10%.
When using Friend of Justice, if it hits 2 times, the first hit deals Physical damage equal to 10% of attack, and the second hit deals 130% of attack.
If the target has defense debuffs, increases critical rate and critical damage by 10%.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 5 - One Shot, One Victory

keys.effect: When using the active skill Senior's Admonishment, if it causes Stability Break on the enemy target, deal additional fixed damage equal to 50% of attack.

vertebrae.effect: If the target has a defense debuff, this skill's cooldown is reduced by 1 turn.

doll.name: Nagant
doll.effects: A Doll who likes to play the mature grown-up, but looks up to heroes and also aspires to be one. Even after leaving the battlefield, she continues to shine as a security Doll, ensuring peaceful nights.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Corrosion Damage dealt by this unit, Corrosion Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by +1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Corrosion Damage dealt is increased by +5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.
